@@A. The trace exhibits several issues, including disobeying task specifications (agents providing simplified implementations instead of real code), weak verification (failing to identify logical errors or missing functionality), action-reasoning mismatches (proposing solutions not supported by analysis), task derailment (proposing irrelevant code), information withholding (providing incomplete information), step repetition (repeating the same thought or information), ignoring other agent's suggestions (continuing despite requests for clarification), and premature termination (failing to complete tasks due to invalid credentials or lack of information). There are also instances of loss of conversation history and unawareness of termination conditions.
